zh.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.Burslem, Stoke-on-Trent district, Staffo: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Adams於大約1510年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆時，他的父親Richard William Adams33歲，母親Margaret30歲。他於大約1530年與Ellen Burslem在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1563年4月18日在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆。

zh-hans.Burslem, Stoke-on-Trent district, Staffo: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Adams于大约1510年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆时，他的父亲Richard William Adams33岁，母亲Margaret30岁。他于大约1530年与Ellen Burslem在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1563年4月18日在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Adams was born about 1510, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard William Adams, was 33 and his mother, Margaret, was 30. He married Ellen Burslem about 1530, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 April 1563, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Adams est né environ 1510, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard William Adams, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Burslem environ 1530, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1563, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Adams um 1510 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard William Adams 33 und seine Mutter Margaret 30. Er hat um 1530 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Burslem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. April 1563 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Burslem, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Adams è nato il circa 1510 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard William Adams, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Burslem circa 1530, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1563, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレム
ja.London, Greater London, England, United: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.Burslem, Stoke-on-Trent district, Staffo: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Adamsが約1510年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで生まれた時，父Richard William Adamsは33歳，母Margaretは30歳であった。約1530年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでEllen Burslemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1563年4月18日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Adams(이)가 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard William Adams(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 Ellen Burslem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1563년 4월 18일 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Adams nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard William Adams, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Burslem aproximadamente 1530, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1563, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Adams родился около 1510 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard William Adams было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Burslem около 1530 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 апреля 1563 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Adams nació aproximadamente 1510, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard William Adams, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ellen Burslem aproximadamente 1530, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de abril de 1563, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
